name: Rosa — single, part-time job, underlying Carer's Allowance entitlement
note: Two carer effects at once: the £48.15 addition, and the earnings disregard rising from £5 to £20 (Sch 6 para 3). Her Carer's Allowance is an underlying entitlement — not in payment, so nothing to count as income.
checked: Arithmetic hand-worked against SPC Regs 2002 Sch 6 paras 3/4A/5 and reg 6(8), 2026-07-12.
